mapper.select: select A.*, B.username, C.title, C.cover, C.price from b_order as A left join b_user as B on (A.user_id=B.id) left join b_thing as C on (A.thing_id=C.id) order by A.order_time desc
select A.*, B.username, C.title, C.cover, C.price from b_order as A left join b_user as B on (A.user_id=B.id) left join b_thing as C on (A.thing_id=C.id) where A.id=#{id} limit 1
